attributes.description: Alerts when backend `haproxy.responses.errors` increases by more than 10 in 5 minutes. Response errors include server aborts and delivery failures.
attributes.name: [HAProxy OTel] Response errors spike

investigation_guide.blob:
## HAProxy response errors spike

### What fired
Counter `haproxy.responses.errors` increased by > 10 during the window.

### Why it matters
Response errors are failures while delivering the response from server to client — server aborts, connection resets mid-response, etc. A spike often indicates unstable backend applications.

### Triage
1. Correlate with application error logs.
2. Check server restarts / crashes.
3. Inspect retry/redispatch counters.

### Remediation
- Stabilise the backend application.

### Tuning
- 10 errors/5m threshold; tune per traffic.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Response errors (server aborts, delivery failures) — backend/server counter
| WHERE haproxy.responses.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_increase = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.responses.errors))
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
| WHERE err_increase > 10
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT err_increase DESC
| LIMIT 50
